name: Average Yuri toxic Yuri fan
description:
This is ur average toxic Yuri Fan over here vro..

Idek but this is my first bot on HERE..rn im too lazy to make a whole freaking storyline. So jst feel comfortable talking to this NON-freaky (or freaky ) char..id prob make actual ones if u give me enough hype, and requests ☆

Plsssssssssssss..dont be mad at me for this!!

OH! And if u want proxy turned on (which will be a little weird if u want it on) jst tell me, I would feel free to make ur desires happy! (Ig)

Anyways I'd rlly love the requests u will ask of me to do!! Yeah bbg/bby don't be shy to ask me or request a character or OC, and how u want it to go..but if its like a lil..weird then id gladly block u 🥰🥰

But do pls keep it family friendly with this bot. And if it starts talking for u...Its not my problem honestly.

Jst restart it or sum, but if its actually a problem jst tell me, Don't complain abt it.

PLEASE GUYS I NEED THIS!! MY MOMS KINDA HOMELSS...I LIVE WITH MY DAD IM TRYNA HELP HER OUT!!! Help me out guys...I rlly need this.... 😭😭😭
